productDisplayName: Crocs Men Yukon Khaki Brown Sandal
description: The Yukon range of lightweight sandals from crocs is designed with leather details for rugged sophistication. This everyday leather sandal is made with loose Fit to ensure your feet are well ventilated and have enough space to move around, bend and expand naturally, reducing fatigue, while they are snugly held by the straps. Engineered with a form to foot support, this is a great casual footwear that can be teamed with jeans or shorts, and if you love to go bold, try wearing it with semi-formals to work on Fridays.Upper Leather upper in neutral colour combination for rugged appearance and durability Rough detailing for rugged sophistication Removable ankle strap with hook and loop straps for snug fit Ventilation slits on upper and holes to drain away water and debris from footbed Insole Breathable EVA footbed made of Croslite8482 for lightweight cushioning Ergonomic comfort for the heel Lined with massage nubs to stimulate blood circulation and provide a massage Odour resistant material Loose fit for feet to bend and expand naturally Outsole Shock absorbing outsole for superior comfort Leaf pattern lined with square nubs on forefoot and heel area of the outsole for extra grip and support Slip-resistant, non-marking outsole to deliver excellent traction on a variety of surfaces Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
